title: Notification No.79/2015-CUS(NT), dated 18.08.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No.79/ 2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 18th August, 2015 S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (IV) Air Cargo Complex (Export), Sahar, Andheri (East), Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the authority mentioned in column (3) of the Table below, for the purpose of adjudicating the matter relating to Show Cause Notice, specified in the corresponding entry in column (2) of the said table, pertaining to the company mentioned in the corresponding entry in column (4) of the said Table, issued by the authority specified in the corresponding entry in column (5) of the said Table, namely:- Table Sl. No. Show Cause Notice Number and date Authority to whom Show Cause Notice is answerable Names of the Company Show Cause Notice issuing authority (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) 1. F.
